title: Nikto (language)
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Language
|image=
|name=Nikto
|users=[[Nikto/Legends|Nikto]]<ref name="Ultimate Alien Anthology">''[[Ultimate Alien Anthology]]''</ref>
|locations=[[Kintan/Legends|Kintan]]<ref name="Ultimate Alien Anthology" />

The '''Nikto''' language was the native language of the [[Nikto/Legends|Nikto]] species from [[Kintan/Legends|Kintan]].<ref name="Ultimate Alien Anthology" />

Contrarily to [[Klatooinian/Legends|Klatooinians]], Niktos did not forfeit their own language to replace it with [[Huttese/Legends|Huttese]], although most of them learned Huttese as a second language.<ref name="Ultimate Alien Anthology" /> Some [[Hutt/Legends|Hutts]] learned to speak Nikto to deal with their Nikto servants.<ref name="t">''[[Tempest Feud]]''</ref>

Most Nikto who left their world were also fluent in [[Galactic Basic Standard/Legends|Basic]], although they were rarely literate in that language.<ref name="Ultimate Alien Anthology" />

{{Language-stub}}
